title: OASIS 3.0.15
release_notes: Added configurable SWIFT server rows for template generation, legacy template conversion, and OAS-to-template import.
Preloaded default SWIFT server configuration for B2B, CGS, CGS-DKK, COR, FPAD, R2P, RT1, and SCT without forcing preference overrides for existing users.
Improved the Preferences dialog SWIFT Servers tab with editable rows, row deletion, adjustable column widths, and persisted layout settings.
Fixed Create Template from OAS metadata handling so the service selection is preserved with the other conversion metadata.
Improved $index.xlsx SWIFT server row creation so inserted rows keep the expected template styling and merged-cell layout.
Suppressed openpyxl Data Validation warnings during legacy template conversion while keeping unrelated workbook warnings visible.
Removed noisy schema flattener debug output from normal application runs.
